title: Coral Vanda
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}} {{AquaticVehicle |image=[[File:CoralVanda-FF112.png]] |name=''Coral Vanda'' |designer= |manufacturer=[[Pantolomin Shipwrights]]''[[The Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]'' |line= |model=[[Cruiser (aquatic)|Cruiser]] |type= |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |speed= |engine= |depth= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen=Equipped |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |maincomp= |countermeasures=[[Escape pod/Legends|Escape pod]] |armament=Unarmed |complement= |bays= |escapepods=Dozens |crew= |skeleton= |passengers=600''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'' |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |availability= |role=[[Vacation cruiser]] |firstuse= |retired= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|The Coral Vanda?''"
"''It's a subocean luxury casino on Pantolomin. Does three-and seven-day runs through the big network of reefs lying off the northern continent. I've always wanted to go there, but never had the chance.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]|''[[Dark Force Rising]]''}} The '''''Coral Vanda''''' was a well-known luxury submersible [[Cruiser (aquatic)|cruiser]] that operated in the [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] of [[Pantolomin/Legends|Pantolomin]]. ==Characteristics== [[File:CoralVanda_egvv.jpg|thumb|left|250px|''Coral Vanda'' [[:Category:Technical drawing images|schematics]].]] Constructed locally by the [[Pantolomin Shipwrights]] collective, the ''Coral Vanda'' was one of the most sumptuous mobile hotels in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], rivaled only by the giant spaceliners of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. Offering a schedule of excursions lasting three or five standard days, these trips provided a stunning sightseeing tour. Despite this, most of the people traveling aboard the ''Coral Vanda'' did so to gamble in one of the eight extravagant casinos, each of which featured its own theme, identity and unique game. The vessel featured, among others, the [[Tralla Room]] and the [[Saffkin Room]]. ==History== [[File:CoralVanda.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The ''Coral Vanda'']] Prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the scoundrels [[Raal Yorta]], [[Smileredon-Verdont]] and [[Sammie Staable]] attempted a heist on the ''Coral Vanda''.{{CSWECite|I|140|''Coral Vanda''}} In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]],''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' [[General/Legends|Generals]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] visited the ''Coral Vanda'' while searching for information about the fabled [[Katana fleet]]. However, due to the duplicity of one of their sources, Solo and Calrissian were almost [[Raid on Pantolomin|captured]] by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] forces. Thrawn was later able to secure information on the ''Katana'' fleet by capturing [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Hoffner]], a passenger aboard the ''Coral Vanda''. ==Appearances== *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 26|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 26]] {{Mo}} *''[[X-Wing: Wedge's Gamble]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Wedge's Gamble (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}} *''[[Dark Force Rising]]'' {{Ab|Dark Force Rising (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} *[[Dark Force Rising 6|''Dark Force Rising'' 6]] ==Sources== [[File:Coral_Vanda.jpg|thumb|right|180px|Deck plans.]] {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of the Coral Vanda}} *''[[Dark Force Rising Sourcebook]]'' *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Second Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *{{JournalCite|4|Creatures Preview}} *''[[The Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]'' *''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]'' *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *{{FactFile|112|VAN 1-2|''Coral Vanda''}} *{{FactFile|124|PAN 1-2|Pantolomin}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Coral Vanda#legends |hu=Coral Vanda }} [[Category:Aquatic vehicles]] [[Category:Casinos]] [[Category:Luxury vehicles]] [[Category:Pantolomin Shipwrights products]]
